title: [HW] Use multiple reduction matches in port pruner

features.name: hw_module_port_pruning
features.description: Code should include module port declarations (input or output) that can be removed by reduction pattern. The reducer can prune ports from modules including extern modules, adjusting instance ops accordingly.
features.snippet: module Foo(input a, output b); endmodule

features.name: hw_instance_port_connections
features.description: Code should include instance operations connecting to module ports. The reducer adjusts instance ops when ports are pruned to maintain connectivity consistency.

features.name: hw_extern_module_declaration
features.description: Code should include extern module declarations (modules without body) which are common due to module externalizer reduction and can have ports pruned.
features.snippet: extern module Bar(input x, output y);
